division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
chapter_title: Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures
text: Fines and forfeitures received by a county under Section 1463 of the Penal Code may be used to reimburse the state for the construction of platform scales and vehicle inspection facilities in the county.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 2. Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures [42200 - 42240]
#### Article 1. Fines and Forfeitures [42200 - 42205]
##### § 42201.1

Fines and forfeitures received by a county under Section 1463 of the Penal Code may be used to reimburse the state for the construction of platform scales and vehicle inspection facilities in the county.

*(Added by Stats. 1985, Ch. 407, Sec. 1. Effective July 30, 1985.)*
